candidates.why: Represents the company’s main operating revenue line; best match for top-line revenue among candidates.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for total revenue.

Residual financial income, not core operating revenue.
Income from associates/joint ventures, not gross revenue.
Income tax; unrelated to revenue.

candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
